creator: ambrisko@FreeBSD.org
text: It would be nice to have VB 7.X working since it has other things such as emulated TPM and other things.  However, someone has to work on it.  Fortunately, my need for TPM with Windows is reduced now so I can use Bhyve now.  I was able to get VB 7.X working by running Linux in VB on FreeBSD and then VB 7.X inside that Linux guest.
